name: publish
tagline: Runs the full oh-my-opencode release pipeline: triggers the GitHub Actions publish workflow, verifies npm/platform artifacts, drafts release
verdict: Mostly a well-specified CI/release runbook with good failure handling, but it silently does more than its description says (drafts marketing copy and posts a public @here Discord announcement via a hardcoded bot ID) and is written to push the agent past confirmation checkpoints once a bump type is given, reducing human oversight before irreversible public ac

highlights.summary: After the single initial bump-type confirmation, the skill explicitly instructs the agent to skip further acknowledgement gates: ‘Do not stop before Step 7.5’, ‘Do not end the assistant turn here’, an

Repeated CRITICAL/MANDATORY/hard-gate framing and explicit turn-control directives (‘Do not end the assistant turn here’, ‘Do not wait for a second user acknowledgement’) are aimed at overriding the a

Description (line 3) only says ‘Publish ... to npm by triggering the GitHub Actions publish workflow and verifying its artifacts’, but the skill also drafts marketing release copy (Step 6) and posts a
